result.markdown:
--- title: "Comparison Report: PB/T-ALL" author: "Ali Al-Timimi, PhD" format: html params: data_file: "C:/Users/drziy/OneDrive/Desktop/Ali/scientific_research_current/global-cancer-complexity/output/global_cancer/RData/comparison_data/comparison_data_pb_t_all.rds" execute: eval: true --- ::: {.panel-tabset} ### PB/T-ALL Overview ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Probes > - **Cancer Category:** leukemias > - **Chip hu35ksuba**: 1600 filtered probes > - **Chip hu6800**: 994 filtered probes ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](../../resources/plots/probes/pb_t_all_probe_counts.png){width=7in} ::: ::: #### Summary Assessment **Overall Complexity & Entropy Assessment** | Measure | All Filtered Probes | GO MF Terms | KEGG Pathways | HALLMARK Genes | |:---|:---|:---|:---|:---| | **Complexity** | not available | strong gain (moderately supported) | strong gain (moderately supported) | strong gain (uncertain) | | **Shannon Entropy** | not available | strongly chaotic (uncertain) | strongly chaotic (uncertain) | strongly chaotic (moderately supported) | | **Spectral Entropy** | not available | no clear change (uncertain) | strongly anti-chaotic (moderately supported) | strongly anti-chaotic (moderately supported) | ::: {.callout-note} **Interpretation Guide** - **Gain** = Increased complexity from normal to tumor - **Loss** = Complexity reduction from normal to tumor - **Chaotic** = Increased entropy from normal to tumor - **Anti-Chaotic** = Entropy reduction from normal to tumor - **P-values** = All p-values unadjusted unless noted ::: ::: ### GO Biological Process Clusters ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change ⚠️ Table not available. #### Spectral Entropy Change ⚠️ Table not available. ::: ### GO Molecular Function Terms ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change **Significant GO Molecular Function Terms (Complexity)** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](../../resources/plots/go/pb_t_all_go_complexity.png){width=7in} ::: :::

::: ### Latent Geometry **Latent-space normal-versus-tumor summary** Latent-space metrics are computed from the VAE representation using samples derived from the **hu35ksuba** platform only. These quantities summarize within-class geometric structure and separation between normal and tumor states in the learned latent space. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ⚠️ Latent-space results are not available for this comparison on the hu35ksuba platform. ``` ::: ::: :::
